1. During routine checking, abnormal echo shown in CCH Radar product dBZ(H)/(V) from 27/5 1927Z. CCH Radar was stopped for maintenance from 0100Z to 0800Z.
2. While CCH Radar was set to OFF state, it was unable to switch to HW_Ready state with error “Fail to initialize component comms1”. Remote support of Meteopress was requested and Meteopress Mr. Tomas has fixed the software configuration of CCH Radar at 0414Z. Abnormal echo also disappeared after the CCH Radar was changed to Running state.
3. Radome Circulation fan was off during on-site inspection due to OFF timer was set. The timer of the fan was disabled and the fan was turned ON.

Motherboard of HKWS2 was replaced by Meteopress staff Mr. Jan Trnka from 0300Z to 1100Z. However the new motherboard are not stable to boot into BIOS sometimes and the old motherboard was installed back to HKWS2.

1. SSPA (V) was replaced by Meteopress staff Mr. Jan Trnka from 0230Z to 0800Z. TX Power (V) resumed from 60dBm to 64.4dBm.
2. Voltage Monitoring Board was added for LNA (H) and (V) by Mr. Jan.
3. Circulation Fan was added under the Pedestal to enhance the heat circulation inside the Radome. Overall component temperature inside Radome decreased by around 7-10 °C.
